Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given 18 events from multiple cases patient journeys There is no explicit case ID We need to group events that belong to the same patient based on attributes patient_age patient_gender department activity sequence timestamps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have three distinct patients apparent from the data

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Patient 1 age 45 gender M appears in events 1 4 7 12 15

Text: Patient 2 age 62 gender F appears in events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So clearly three patients 45 M 62 F 28 M

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Each event belongs to one of these based on age and gender

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: But we must also consider that there could be multiple patients with same age and gender Unlikely given the context

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can group by patient_age patient_gender That gives three cases
